claims.B1: OnceLock<Regex> eliminates per-call regex compilation overhead
claims.B2: AhoCorasick single-pass scan outperforms 25x sequential contains()
claims.B3: law_table() static slice removes per-call Vec allocation
claims.B5: memchr line index O(log n) lookup vs O(n) lines().count() per match
claims.B6: FxHashMap 3.4x faster than std::HashMap for short static-str keys
claims.B7: OnceLock<Vec<Regex>> cache gives 11.7x speedup on scan_uri_classified hot path (66us -> 5.7us per didChange)
claims.B8: Pre-compiled glob cache gives ~3000x speedup on workspace glob matching (62ms -> 20us per 500 evaluations)
claims.B9: 5-pack AhoCorasick (17us) faster than 5-pack sequential regex (6.7us avg) at scale; single-pack regex (1.05us) fastest for sparse packs
claims.B10: Arc<snapshot> clone is 5ns vs 14.5us deep-copy -- 2870x cost difference proves Arc-snapshot design is correct at 50-doc workspace size
